title: Sir Mordred
wikitext:
{{External|rs|rsc}} {{Infobox Monster |name = Sir Mordred |image = [[File:Sir Mordred.png|150px]] |release = [[27 February]] [[2002]] |update = Latest RuneScape News (27 February 2002) |members = Yes |combat = 39 |size = 1 |examine = Leader of the Renegade Knights. |xpbonus = 0 |max hit = 5 |aggressive = No |poisonous = No |attack style = [[Slash]] |attack speed = 4 |hitpoints = 38 |att = 33 |str = 33 |def = 33 |mage = 1 |range = 1 |attbns = 20 |strbns = 16 |amagic = 0 |mbns = 0 |arange = 0 |rngbns = 0 |dstab = 99 |dslash = 82 |dcrush = 45 |dmagic = 0 |drange = 0 |immunepoison = Not immune |immunevenom = Not immune |immunecannon = No |immunethrall = No |respawn = 25 |id = 3527 }} [[File:Sir Mordred chathead.png|left]] '''Sir Mordred''' can be found on the top floor of [[Keep Le Faye]] near [[Catherby]]. He is fought during the [[Merlin's Crystal]] quest. He can be fought, but when he reaches 0 hitpoints, [[Morgan Le Faye]] will appear and ask that you spare him. The player must then ask Morgan to help them free Merlin from the crystal. The player can also choose to spare or kill him through a dialogue, but they will have to repeat the fight afterwards. If killed, he will respawn shortly. If you ignore Morgan Le Faye and continue to attack him, he will regenerate all of his hitpoints and you must fight him again while Morgan Le Faye wanders around aimlessly. During the King's Ransom quest, he will actually die if you attack him, but will respawn soon afterwards. Sir Mordred is also the leader of the [[Renegade Knight]]s. For whatever reason, he is much weaker than the rest of the [[Knights of the Round Table]], despite being a former member of their order. ==Location== {{LocTableHead|league=yes}} {{LocLine |name = Sir Mordred |location = [[Keep Le Faye]] (Second Floor) |levels = 39 |members = Yes |mapID = 0 |plane = 2 |x:2769,y:3403 |mtype = pin |leagueRegion = Kandarin }} {{LocLine |name = Sir Mordred |location = [[Keep Le Faye]] (Instanced) |levels = 39 |members = Yes |mapID = 10087 |plane = 2 |x:1695,y:4258 |mtype = pin |leagueRegion = Kandarin }} {{LocTableBottom}} ==Drops== ===100%=== {{DropsTableHead}} {{DropsLine|name=Bones|quantity=1|rarity=Always}} {{DropsTableBottom}} ==Dialogue== {{hastranscript|speaksin}} ==Changes== {{Subject changes header}} {{Subject changes |date = 24 July 2007 |update = King's Ransom |change = The NPC was graphically updated with the release of King's Ransom. }} {{Subject changes |date = 14 November 2005 |update = Shadow of the Storm |change = The NPC's sword was graphically updated. }} {{Subject changes |date = 5 May 2004 |update = Bigger Banks & Treasure Trails |change = The NPC's shield was graphically updated. }} {{Subject changes footer}} ===Gallery (historical)=== {|style="text-align: center" cellpadding="15" |[[File:Sir Mordred (historical v1).png|center|300x150px]] |[[File:Sir Mordred (historical v2).png|300x150px]] |[[File:Sir Mordred (historical v3).png|300x150px]] |[[File:Sir Mordred.png|300x150px]] |- |[[File:Sir Mordred chathead (historical).png]] |[[File:Sir Mordred chathead (historical).png]] |[[File:Sir Mordred chathead (historical).png]] |[[File:Sir Mordred chathead.png]] |- |29 March 2004 –
